description: Orange printed backpackOne padded haul loop, padded adjustable shoulder straps and a padded back with mesh detailingTwo main zip compartments, one has a slip pocket and a padded laptop sleeve with Velcro closure, the other has slip pocketsOne external zip pocketOne zip pocket on the side and one open pocket on the other sidePadded backPlease note that the thread colour in the brand logo may vary from the image shownNote: The inner lining material/colour may vary from what is shown in the imageWarranty: 6 months against manufacturing defects
